hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -z "${GITHUB_ACTIONS:-}" ] && printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'dbt[[:space:]][^|;&]*--target[[:space:]]+prod'; then printf 'BLOCKED: --target prod from local shell. Use GitHub Actions.\n' >&2; exit 2; fi

WORKLOG="/Users/david/Documents/data ops/WORKLOG.md"; if [ -f "$WORKLOG" ]; then content=$(tail -n 200 "$WORKLOG"); jq -n --arg ctx "$content" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("# Project worklog (tail)\n\n" + $ctx)}}'; else jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: "No WORKLOG.md yet at /Users/david/Documents/data ops/WORKLOG.md — consider creating one."}}'; fi
